ramp.xds: Getting Help

Source: R/xds_help.R
xds_help.Rd

ramp.xds concepts and functions are well documented. These help guides are designed to find what you need.

  • xds_help_basic_setup is an overview of basic setup

  • xds_help_setup_options is an overview of other options

  • get_ functions inspect a model component or outputs

  • change_ functions modify part of a model component

  • setup_ functions replace a model component

XH Component

Type ?XH_ to find a list of help guides for human / host demography, infection, & immunity.

  • XH_module_list – list of XH Modules

  • XH_functions – list of functions for XH Modules

  • XH_get – list of get_ functions for XH Modules

  • XH_change – list of change_ functions for XH Modules

  • XH_setup – list of setup_ functions for XH Modules

MY Component

Type ?MY_ to find a list of help guides for adult mosquito ecology & infection dynamics.

  • MY_module_list – list of MY Modules

  • MY_functions – list of functions for MY Modules

  • MY_get – list of get_ functions for MY Modules

  • MY_change – list of change_ functions for MY Modules

  • MY_setup – list of setup_ functions for MY Modules

L Component

Type ?L_ to find a list of help guides for immature mosquito ecology.

  • L_module_list – list of L Modules

  • L_functions – list of functions for L Modules

  • L_get – list of get_ functions for L Modules

  • L_change – list of change_ functions for L Modules

  • L_setup – list of setup_ functions for L Modules
